# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Before making any changes to this repository, **always read `DESIGN.md`** in the repository root.

`DESIGN.md` is the single source of truth for:
- Game design and round flow
- Code architecture rules (service locator, systems, player logic, state machine, game state, config, naming)
- Art style and rendering guidelines
- Lore and setting

All code changes must comply with the rules and conventions defined in `DESIGN.md`.
